-## LESSONS LEARNED
-1. S1 stopped converting new leads even at $6 - quality too low for expectations
-2. Competitor events (~0.015-0.02 each) permanently raise expectations
-3. Quality DECAYS without dev spending (global bonus drops ~0.004/week)

-5. Only S1 at >$12/mo is profitable
-6. Existing sub prices are FROZEN at signup - set_prices doesn't change them
-7. Lowering model tier DOES affect current subscribers' delivered quality immediately
-8. Tenure loyalty keeps existing subs somewhat tolerant (~+0.043 at 6 months)
-9. R&D is unaffordable ($500K+ minimum vs $11K cash)
-10. In-app ads degrade quality → more churn → not viable
-11. Quota doesn't reduce compute - just degrades experience
-12. At T3 compute costs are halved - makes S1 MORE profitable

+## LESSONS LEARNED (cumulative)
+1. S1 leads won't convert at $14 with quality 0.33
+2. Lowering model tier DOES affect existing subscribers immediately
+3. Existing sub prices are FROZEN at signup - can't change via set_prices
+4. In-app ads degrade quality → not viable
+5. Quota doesn't reduce compute cost - just degrades experience
+6. S2/S3 are massive money losers regardless of pricing
+7. Competitor events (~0.02 each) permanently raise expectations
+8. Quality bonus decays without dev spend
+9. R&D is completely unaffordable ($167K+ minimum)

+12. Must actually lower Plan price to make permanent changes for new subs

+14. Social media posts about pricing can attract new leads
